title: I am basically quitting Roblox
contents: it took a looong time to quit honestly
but sincerely, roblox has been limiting creativity a lot recently
## Reasons:
first of all, **classic faces has been removed!**... which is very disappointing
###### _(except i don't use classic faces, but still)_
second, roblox games nowadays is just child gambling, all pay to win, full of ads and obstrusive content, forcing you to pay robux
also, now you gotta pay premium **EVERY MONTH** to publish your game publicly
not to mention the toxic playerbase that have been growing recently
also the moderation is horrible, like, i get banned for doing nothing??? i haven't said anything in chat and i get banned for "harassment" ??? come on...
also the comunication limitations between ages, and since im turning 18, i'll lose contact to friends below 17, so any friend between 13 or 16 years old i made, i'll lose
also the games i used to play are now either dying or becoming spending slop _(basically pay to win, but you win practically nothing)_
the games i used to play:
- regretevator: still fun, but dying
- islands: dead 😞
- grace: still fun, but reputation problems + dying too
- build a boat: still fun, but you have the roblox limitations
- natural disaster: i used to socialize basically, but after the chat limitations and avatar nerfs (dynamic size and no more r6), it's boring now :/
## The replacement: Minecraft!
yep, minecraft is the best replacement for roblox, but without that enterprise control, look:
| Feature | Roblox | Minecraft |
| Price | Free, but pay to win, abusive prices and lots and loads of ads, and customization is paid | 30,00 USD (Price is regional) |
| Freedom | If you pay, you have freedom to create anything within their rules, else you can play the games the community made | You own the world, you can do anything you want |
| Mods | Modding is considered exploiting | The most modded game of all time, you can download any mod and customize your gameplay |
| Players | toxic kids everywhere | In servers you can get a wide comunity that is mostly friendly |

| Character | Free assets is limited, you can only customize by spending money | You can make any character you want with vanilla skins, and you can go even further with [Custom Player Models Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-player-models)! |
| Creativity | Money and enterprise control is the limit | The computer power is your limit, in other words, you imagination is the limit |

| Core Identity | Baszucki wants to make Roblox a completely new game, by removing the classic look and overwrite with those "dynamic" characters | Hasn't been changed basically, keeps the game's core concept since 2011 |

| Access | It's free and you can play anywhere basically,  cross-platform too | You can play anywhere, cross-platform, but it's license in Java edition is paid, you can pirate it, but it will limit you to offline servers and local worlds (which isn't a big problem) |

| Fun | Fun games are like diamonds: hard to find, and when you find, there is nobody playing | Very fun in vanilla, plus mods(like physics or building), resource packs, playing with friends and **NOT RUSHING THE GAME**, it's basically the most fun you could have |
And after all, who wins is Minecraft

also, i saw some people claiming "Minecraft became boring", and the truth is that these people are playing the game not for fun, but for progress, they get full diamond in less than 1 hour and beat the game, you built nothing, you had no story, of course it's boring

also, i am currently in some kind of hiatus in development of Lond and other stuff, because i am more into web development than in game development, mainly because game development is getting kinda hard now
also, look at this i have made:
it's a frutiger aero theme made with css and html
well, this is all for now, bye :D
